description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Development that can be triggered manually with a commit or tag input and on push events to all branches except release/**, ignoring paths like *.md, docs/**, and Jenkinsfile. The workflow should run on a Docker environment with write permissions for ID token and repository contents. It checks out the specified commit or tag, configures AWS credentials, logs in to the Docker registry, sets an image tag based on the Git commit hash, builds a Docker image using the Dockerfile, and pushes the image to Amazon ECR.
